sctypeahead.topsearchedcategories.splitK.title: Split keyword for searching
sctypeahead.topsearchedcategories.splitK.description: if true then keyword would be split by spaces before searching. i.e. complete pistol => complete pistol + complete + pistol all 3 would be used for searching

sctypeahead.topsearchedcategories.maxCat.title: Maximum Categories allowed to be shown on Desktop
Maximum Categories allowed to be shown on Mobile

sctypeahead.topsearchedcategories.filter.title: Filter Categories Suggestion By Weightage
sctypeahead.topsearchedcategories.filter.description: Enable this if you want to remove irrelevent results from categories suggestion.

sctypeahead.topsearchedcategories.minimu.title: Minimum weightage required for a category to be displayed
sctypeahead.topsearchedcategories.minimu.description: Minimum weightage required for a category to be displayed. will only work when enabled categories filtering is enabled. should be in range of 0 to 100. where 100 mean highest accuracy and 0 mean least accuracy
